name: Tatsuya Miura
bio: Architecting applications with React and IoT systems with Arduino. Keen on memory-safe systems and distributed architectures.

projects.name: Music App
projects.desc: Music application utilising React and Cloudflare R2 storage.

projects.desc: An operating system kernel written in Rust.

experiences.desc: Lead web development and architectural design for scalable systems.

research.title: Distributed Systems & Edge Computing

research.desc: A deep dive into memory safety and concurrency models in operating system design.

awards.title: National Runner-up in Space Koshien CanSat division
